tools.name: get_brands
tools.description: Search authorized brands and manufacturers on authorized.by. Returns brand names, slugs, logos and authorized-retailer counts. Omit 'search' to retrieve the full index.

tools.name: get_brand
tools.description: Get the full profile for a specific brand: categories, website, headquarters country and description.

tools.name: get_brand_retailers
tools.description: Get all retailers authorized by a brand, sorted by subscription plan (PREMIUM → START → FREE) then by brand-connection count descending. Each retailer includes seal_implemented (whether the authorized.by seal is live on their shop).

tools.name: get_retailers
tools.description: Search authorized retailers (shops) on authorized.by. Returns retailer names, slugs, shop URLs, logos, authorized-brand counts and seal_implemented (whether the authorized.by seal is live on their shop). Omit 'search' to retrieve the full index.

tools.name: get_retailer
tools.description: Get the full profile for a specific retailer: address, contact details, opening hours, categories, subscription plan, TÜV certification, customer rating and seal_implemented (whether the authorized.by seal is live on their shop).

tools.name: get_retailer_brands
tools.description: Get all brands a retailer is authorized to sell, sorted by brand name. Each entry includes the partnership_date (when the retailer became authorized for that brand).
